name: Inveo Yatirim Holding A.S.
summary: Gedik Yatirim Holding A.S. invests in companies with technical planning, programming, budgeting, projecting, and financial businesses. It also invests in securities, cash, precious metals, and commodities. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Inveo Yatirim Holding A.S. was formerly a subsidiary of Gedik Yatirim Menkul Degerler A.S.
